description: Review Notifications and App Badge - Local notifications and badge count to help users stay on top of WaniKani reviews

userStories.title: Install and configure notification library
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the notification library installed and configured so that other features can use it.
acceptanceCriteria: Install @notifee/react-native package
Configure iOS notification settings in Info.plist if needed
Configure Android notification channel 'Review Reminders' with vibration only (no sound)
Basic notification test passes (can create and display a notification)
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Create notification service with permission functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a notification service that can request and check permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/services/notificationService.ts
Implement requestPermissions() function that requests notification permissions from OS
Implement checkPermissions() function that returns current permission status
Functions work on both iOS and Android
Unit tests for permission functions
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add badge management to notification service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need functions to update and clear the app icon badge.
acceptanceCriteria: Add setBadgeCount(count: number) function to notificationService
Add clearBadge() function that sets badge to 0
Badge of 0 clears the badge entirely from app icon
Functions work on both iOS and Android
Unit tests for badge functions
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add notification scheduling to service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need functions to schedule and cancel notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Add scheduleHourlyNotification(reviewCount: number) function that schedules notification for next o'clock
Add cancelAllNotifications() function that cancels all scheduled notifications
Notification message format: '{count} reviews ready! Time to level up your Japanese'
Notifications use vibration only (no sound)
Unit tests for scheduling functions
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add notification settings storage
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store notification preferences using the existing settings infrastructure.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'notifications_enabled' setting key to settings storage
Add 'notifications_permission_asked' setting key to track if we've asked for permissions
Default value for notifications_enabled is true (if permissions granted)
Create helper functions: getNotificationsEnabled(), setNotificationsEnabled(boolean), hasAskedForPermissions(), setHasAskedForPermissions()
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Create pre-permission explanation screen
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to understand why the app needs notification permissions before being asked.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/screens/NotificationPermissionScreen.tsx
Screen displays explanation: 'Get reminded when you have reviews waiting so you never miss a study session'
Screen has 'Enable Notifications' button that triggers system permission dialog
Screen has 'Maybe Later' button that skips and stores preference
Add screen to navigation stack
Matches existing app styling (dark theme, clean typography)
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show permission screen on first launch
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to see the permission explanation on first launch only.
acceptanceCriteria: On first app launch (after API key setup), navigate to NotificationPermissionScreen
After user responds (Enable or Maybe Later), mark hasAskedForPermissions as true
Screen does not appear on subsequent launches
If user already granted permissions via system settings, skip the screen
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Add notification toggle to Settings screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to turn notifications on or off in Settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Review Notifications' toggle in Settings screen
Toggle shows current on/off state from stored setting
Toggle is disabled (grayed out) if permissions not granted, with helper text 'Enable in system settings'
Tapping disabled toggle opens system notification settings for the app
Setting persists across app restarts
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
Verify in simulator using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement hourly notification scheduling logic
userStories.description: As a user, I want to receive notifications at the top of each hour when I have 20+ reviews.
acceptanceCriteria: Create background task that checks reviews at the top of each hour
Task queries total available reviews (current + becoming available at that hour)
If count >= 20 and notifications enabled, schedule notification
If count < 20, do not schedule notification
Notification is NOT shown if app is in foreground (use AppState API)
Tapping notification opens the app to home screen
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Update badge when notification fires
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app badge to show my pending review count.
acceptanceCriteria: When hourly check runs, update app badge to current available review count
Badge shows exact number (e.g., '47' not '40+')
Badge displays correctly on both iOS and Android
Badge count of 0 clears the badge entirely
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Update badge when reviews are completed
userStories.description: As a user, I want the badge to update after completing reviews.
acceptanceCriteria: After completing a review session, recalculate available reviews count
Update app badge to new count
If count reaches 0, clear badge entirely
Badge updates when review session ends (on ReviewCompletion screen)
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Handle notification toggle changes
userStories.description: As a user, I want toggling notifications off to cancel scheduled notifications and clear the badge.
acceptanceCriteria: When toggled OFF: cancel all scheduled notifications and clear badge
When toggled ON: schedule next hourly notification check
Changes take effect immediately
All tests pass
All quality checks pass

userStories.title: Handle permission changes from system settings
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to respect my system-level notification settings.
acceptanceCriteria: When app returns to foreground, check current permission status
If permissions were revoked externally, update settings toggle to reflect this
If permissions were granted externally, enable the toggle
No duplicate permission requests after initial ask
All tests pass
All quality checks pass
